calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2019 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Oct-03-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Gail Dekreon, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-717-9768. Email: casey.giselle@gmail.com.

Roger E. Jackson, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, Global Eagle Entertainment Inc. FKA RMG Networks Inc.
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Regents Travels & Tours LLC,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Damages: $102,457.84
Pre-Judgment Interest: $73,773.80
Attorney's Fees: $2825.00
Costs: $458.20
Total Judgment in the amount of $179,514.84

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2019 Continued To Oct-30-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
